templates.name: Salon Comeback Offer
templates.subject: Hey {{name}}, we saved you something 🎁
templates.body:
Hey {{name}} 👋

It’s been a while since your last visit at {{company}}.

Get 20% OFF on your next visit (valid 3 days only).

Reply YES to book.

– {{company}}

templates.name: Urgency Offer
templates.subject: {{name}}, don’t miss this 👀
templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

Here’s a limited-time offer from {{company}}:
👉 Flat 20% OFF

Only valid for 72 hours.

Reply YES to claim.

templates.name: Soft Comeback Offer
templates.subject: {{name}}, we haven’t seen you in a while 🙂
templates.body:
Hey {{name}},

It’s been a while since your last visit at {{company}}.

We were just going through our client list and thought of you 🙂

So we’ve kept something small for you — 20% off your next visit.

No pressure, just thought you might want to drop by again.

If you’re free this week, we’ll reserve a slot for you.

– Team {{company}}

templates.name: Follow-up Comeback
templates.subject: {{name}}, quick one from {{company}}
templates.body:
Hey {{name}},

Haven’t seen you at {{company}} in a while.

We’re running a small comeback offer this week, so thought we’d reach out.

You can come in and get 20% off your next visit.

Let me know if you want me to book a slot for you.

– Team {{company}}
